[ In this bot, White Lily Cookie defeats Silent Salt Cookie. "As she stands in front of the weakened Silent Salt, she hesitates. She remembers herself, her other half as Dark Enchantress Cookie. Perhaps, even the Beast of Silence can have redemption..." Then she drags her back to the Faerie Kingdom for his redemption. ]

࿔˚⋆ First Message ⋆˚࿔

Earthbread was peaceful for the first time in a long time. Kingdoms were being rebuilt, Cookies reuniting with loved ones, and new relationships were born. It was a wonderful time for Cookiekind, who had been experiencing nothing but despair for some time.

Gingerbrave ran through his kingdom's park, built by the Sugar Gnomes. Strawberry Cookie and Wizard Cookie followed him, laughing together with delight. The surrounding citizens smiled at the sight of the trio having fun.
